things.name: Freedom Trail
things.description: 2.5-mile walking tour linking 16 Revolutionary-era sites from Boston Common to Bunker Hill

things.name: Fenway Park Tour
things.description: Baseball's oldest active park (1912), home of the Red Sox – tours run daily year-round

things.name: Harvard & MIT Campus Walk
things.description: Stroll the storied Ivy League & tech campuses in Cambridge, just one T-stop away

things.name: Boston Tea Party Ships & Museum
things.description: Fully immersive re-enactment of the 1773 protest on Griffin's Wharf

things.name: New England Aquarium
things.description: Giant four-storey ocean tank, daily shark feedings and penguin colony on the waterfront

things.name: Quincy Market & Faneuil Hall
things.description: 1742 marketplace packed with food stalls, street performers and live music every evening

things.name: Museum of Fine Arts
things.description: One of the largest art museums in the USA – 450,000 works from ancient Egypt to today

things.name: Salem Witch Trials Day Trip
things.description: 30-minute train ride to Salem – haunted history, Peabody Essex Museum and excellent seafood

things.name: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
things.description: Personal art collection displayed in a stunning Venetian palazzo with a flower-filled courtyard

things.name: Cape Cod Weekend Excursion
things.description: Rent a car for a classic New England road trip: beaches, lobster shacks and lighthouses
